subcodes.first_line: O lamp of the love of God! Kashan is like the glass and the holy fragrances are as the flame. Praise be to God, this glass [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرج محبت الله کاشان مانند زجاج است و نفحات قدس مانند سراج الحمد لله این زجاج
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @martyrs and martyrdom
